top_signals.title: China Broadens Market Rescue With Record Inflows Into Tech ETF
top_signals.summary: China is stepping up efforts to stabilize its stock market, mobilizing a range of state-linked institutions to stem a tech-driven selloff.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Toyota head vows to enhance ties with business partners
top_signals.summary: Toyota President Kenta Kon also indicated the company's stance to continue making 3 million vehicles a year in Japan to help keep related domestic industries afloat.
